caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders sits in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing on racks. He wears glasses, over-ear headphones, and a tall, grey, textured wig. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. On-screen text and logos appear on both sides of the man, featuring a microphone icon and the words "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth slightly open and his facial expression remaining focused. He remains seated and still while talking, with only slight shifts in his head position and mouth movements visible as the scene progresses. The background remains static, showing a wall of framed photographs and various garments including items with the word "LEE" visible.
